biography: Rasmus, a familiar name at Vihti Golf Club, is known for his strategic mind and meticulous approach to the game. While generally perceived as a reserved personality, those who know him well speak of a fierce competitor who leaves no stone unturned in his pursuit of excellence on the course.

Rasmus has graced the greens of the Hector Trophée on one occasion. Although he hasn't yet lifted the coveted Hector Trophée or secured the Victor Trophy, his dedication to the sport is evident in every swing.

While Rasmus is not expected to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts will remember his contributions to the sport and will not forget his past appearance in the tournament. One can never exclude last-minute changes to the participating field either.
